---
title: "The New Knowledge Worker: Thriving in the Age of AI Agents"
author: Lawrence Wu
date: '2026-04-17'
categories: [ai, "claude code", "agentic ai", tutorial, video]
image: images/agentic_stack.png
---

Knowledge work is changing fast. I gave a talk today about what it actually means to work effectively in 2026, when AI agents can write code, run research, manage memory, and coordinate with tools on your behalf.

{{< video https://youtu.be/noSqIsPSsgo >}} <!-- markdownlint-disable-line MD034 -->

The talk covers the **Agentic AI Stack** — the mental model I use to think about how humans and AI systems work together — and practical strategies for becoming a more effective knowledge worker in the age of agents.

The diagrams and materials from this talk are [here](https://github.com/lawwu/ai-tutorials/tree/main/04-new-knowledge-worker).

## Timestamps

- [00:00:00](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=0s) Introduction
- [00:02:42](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=162s) The Progression of AI: 2022 to 2026
- [00:11:06](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=666s) Introducing the Agentic AI Stack
- [00:11:57](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=717s) Layer 1 — The Model (Frontier vs. Open LLMs)
- [00:12:22](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=742s) Layer 2 — The Harness (Claude Code, Codex & more)
- [00:13:52](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=832s) Layer 3 — Memory (Markdown, CLAUDE.md, Obsidian)
- [00:16:33](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=993s) Layer 3 — Skills
- [00:18:51](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=1131s) Layer 3 — Connectors & Other Features
- [00:19:54](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=1194s) Layer 4 — Agentic Knowledge Work Use Cases
- [00:24:26](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=1466s) Agentic Brains
- [00:26:57](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=1617s) Demo: Codex Chief of Staff
- [00:32:15](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=1935s) Mindset
- [00:38:33](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=2313s) Read the Docs
- [00:40:37](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=2437s) Downsides & Pitfalls of AI
- [00:43:08](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noSqIsPSsgo&t=2588s) Q&A / Wrap-up

## Notes

<https://github.com/lawwu/ai-tutorials/blob/main/04-new-knowledge-worker/NOTES.md>

## Resources

- [Reflections on AI: 2022 to 2026](https://lawrencewu.net/posts/2026-02-16-reflections-on-ai-2022-2026/)
- [Top 10 Human Skills in the Age of AI](https://lawrencewu.net/posts/2026-03-23-top-10-human-skills/)
- [Karpathy's LLM Wiki](https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f)
- [gbrain](https://github.com/garrytan/gbrain)
- [Claude Code Docs](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/features-overview)
